text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, King Halo receives a fan letter.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, a fan letter? I guess I'll hold onto it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's start the meeting. That's what we're here for,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I got a fan letter! A letter all for me!
Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for this for so long! Let's see
what it says! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, King. Wow, don't you look happy!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! U-Urara, when did you get back?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just a second ago! Hey, who's the letter from?
Lemme see!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But why? C'mon, let me see it! Pleeeeease!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times you ask, the answer
will still be no!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A fan used their precious time to write this letter
to me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's only proper that I handle it with utmost
respect...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: After all, it is a treasure meant only for my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I guess that makes sense!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get it, but I guess I kinda
understand! It's a really important letter, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm glad you understand anyway. Hehe.
